prompt: A wide 16:9 illustration showing four connected UI surfaces of a macOS utility arranged like a family: a menu bar owl icon at top, a notch-shaped floating island panel, a desktop dynamic card widget, and a larger board window with sidebar. Pixel-art owl appears on each surface. Qingshan Lake color palette: misty blue sky, lake cyan, deep cedar green, fog white, touch of morning gold. no text, no letters, no watermark, no brand marks.
